data.title: Sentence analysis
data.statement:
Given a [[sentence]], calculate the total number of words it contains (the [[words_count]]).
Then, identify and print each [[word]] that appears <<at least twice>> and its frequency [[word_freq]], <<ordered by>> their <<first appearance>>.
If all words in the [[sentence]] are unique, print {{Only unique words}} instead.

Words are separated by a space.

testCases.title: (1) Example
testCases.testIn: the old river flows slowly and the old trees sway slowly by the river bank

testCases.title: (1) Example - validator
testCases.testIn: the small village rests quietly and the small houses stand quietly near the village road

testCases.title: (2) Only unique words
testCases.testIn: bright silent forest whispers under golden evening sky beyond distant mountains

testCases.title: (2) Only unique words - validator
testCases.testIn: calm ancient river glimmers beneath radiant morning light across quiet valleys

testCases.title: (3) One not unique word
testCases.testIn: a graceful white swan glides across calm waters and a lake with shimmering ripples

testCases.title: (3) One not unique word - validator
testCases.testIn: a playful dog wanders through open fields and a meadow with gentle breeze

testCases.title: (4) Long sentence
testCases.testIn: the gentle wind moves across the wide open plains and the gentle grass bends softly while the wind carries distant echoes and the plains stretch endlessly under the pale blue sky

testCases.title: (4) Long sentence - validator
testCases.testIn: the quiet rain falls over the dark green forest and the quiet leaves shimmer softly while the rain brings cool whispers and the forest breathes deeply beneath the silver clouds

testCases.title: (5) Long sentence, not ordered by word_count
testCases.testIn: many travelers walk along the long winding road and many stories follow them as the road stretches far beyond the hills and the travelers carry dreams that echo along the road
testCases.testOut:
31
many: 2
travelers: 2
along: 2
the: 5
road: 3
and: 2

testCases.title: (5) Long sentence, not ordered by word_count - validator
testCases.testIn: many voices rise within the vast ancient city and many lights guide them as the city spreads far beyond the walls and the voices carry hopes that shimmer across the city

data.constraints:
64 ≤ Length of [[sentence]] ≤ 256
8 ≤ [[words_count]] ≤ 32
[[sentence]] consists only of lowercase letters {{a}} through {{z}} and space characters.
[[sentence]] does not contain any leading, trailing or consecutive spaces.
data.stubGenerator:
read sentence:string(256)

write words_count
Only unique words | word: word_freq
data.outputDescription:
<<Line 1:>> An integer [[words_count]], representing the total number of words in the [[sentence]].
<<Next lines:>> [[word]]{{: }}[[word_freq]] for each [[word]] appearing at least twice in the [[sentence]], each pair on one line; or if all words are unique, the string {{Only unique words}}

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Given a sentence, calculate the total number of words it contains (the words_count).
Then, identify and print each word that appears at least twice and its frequency word_freq, ordered by their first appearance.
If all words in the sentence are unique, print Only unique words instead.

Words are separated by a space.
Input
Line 1: A string representing the sentence.
Output
Line 1: An integer words_count, representing the total number of words in the sentence.
Next lines: word: word_freq for each word appearing at least twice in the sentence, each pair on one line; or if all words are unique, the string Only unique words
Constraints
64 ≤ Length of sentence ≤ 256
8 ≤ words_count ≤ 32
sentence consists only of lowercase letters a through z and space characters.
sentence does not contain any leading, trailing or consecutive spaces.
Example
Input
the old river flows slowly and the old trees sway slowly by the river bank
Output
15
the: 3
old: 2
river: 2
slowly: 2
